from django.db import models


class VoucherSalesInvoicedetails(models.Model):
    id = models.BigAutoField(primary_key=True)
    tenant_id = models.CharField(max_length=36)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    sales_invoice_no = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    voucher_name = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)
    outward_slip_no = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    customer_name = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    customer = models.ForeignKey('CustomerMasterCustomerBasicdetails', models.DO_NOTHING, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='Link to customer_master_customer_basicdetails.id')
    customer_branch = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)
    voucher_id = models.BigIntegerField(blank=True, null=True, db_comment='Link to unified vouchers table')
    bill_to = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    ship_to = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    gstin = models.CharField(max_length=15, blank=True, null=True)
    contact = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)
    tax_type = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    state_type = models.CharField(max_length=20, blank=True, null=True)
    export_type = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    exchange_rate = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    supporting_document = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)
    sales_order_no = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    place_of_supply = models.CharField(max_length=2, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='State code (01-38)')
    reverse_charge = models.CharField(max_length=1, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='Y or N')
    invoice_type = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='Regular, SEZ with payment, etc.')
    gst_export_type = models.CharField(max_length=10, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='WPAY or WOPAY for exports')
    port_code = models.CharField(max_length=6, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='6-digit port code for exports')
    shipping_bill_number = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='Shipping bill number for exports')
    shipping_bill_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True, db_comment='Shipping bill date for exports')
    ecommerce_gstin = models.CharField(max_length=15, blank=True, null=True, db_comment='E-commerce GSTIN')
    irn = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    ack_no = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'voucher_sales_invoicedetails'


class VoucherSalesItems(models.Model):
    id = models.BigAutoField(primary_key=True)
    tenant_id = models.CharField(max_length=36)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    item_code = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)
    item_name = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    hsn_sac = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    qty = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=4, blank=True, null=True)
    uom = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    item_rate = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    taxable_value = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    igst = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    cgst = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    sgst = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    cess = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    invoice_value = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    sales_ledger = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    description = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    alternate_unit = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    invoice_id = models.BigIntegerField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'voucher_sales_items'


class VoucherSalesPaymentdetails(models.Model):
    id = models.BigAutoField(primary_key=True)
    tenant_id = models.CharField(max_length=36)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    payment_taxable_value = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_igst = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_cgst = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_sgst = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_cess = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_state_cess = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_invoice_value = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_tds_income_tax = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_tds_gst = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_advance = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    payment_payable = models.DecimalField(max_digits=18, decimal_places=2, blank=True, null=True)
    posting_note = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    terms_conditions = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)
    advance_references = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True, db_comment='JSON array of advance references')
    invoice_id = models.BigIntegerField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        managed = False
        db_table = 'voucher_sales_paymentdetails'
